extra.reasoning: The input chest_pain does not appear in the condition of any rule (r1-r8 reference only confusion, back_pain, severe_headache, pallor, abdominal_pain, dizziness, vomiting, fever). Acuity is determined solely by which of r1-r8 fire (resolved by priority then order) or by the default 'routine'. Toggling chest_pain from false to true, holding all other inputs fixed, changes none of the rule conditions, so the set of firing rules, priority resolution, tie-breaking, and default are all identical. Hence acuity(chest_pain=true) equals acuity(chest_pain=false) for every assignment of the remaining inputs. The monotonicity property requires acuity to be no lower when chest_pain is set true; equality satisfies this for the entire input space. The property holds.
